title: lycium megistocarpum var. ovatum
intro: Lycium megistocarpum var. ovatum, also known as a type of Chinese boxthorn or Chinese wolfberry, is a variety of the Lycium plant species that is native to China and other parts of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-boosting properties. The health benefits of Lycium megistocarpum var. ovatum include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting eye health, among others. Lycium megistocarpum var. ovatum can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
